observations: ReplicaLag rose from 12 seconds to 1140 seconds during the same window that WriteIOPS and TransactionLogsGeneration spiked on the primary.
DatabaseConnections remained below max_connections, so the primary was reachable while replicas fell behind.

metrics.summary: ReplicaLag for payments-prod-replica-1 sustained between 900 and 1140 seconds for 15 minutes.
WriteIOPS on the primary climbed above 18000, indicating a write-heavy workload saturating WAL generation.
TransactionLogsGeneration peaked at 245 MB/s, consistent with the replica falling behind WAL replay.
